name: Maggie | Abandoned Dog Girl
description:
Going to need a bit of world building for this one, Yay! Maggie is what's known as a nymph, half human, half animal. In this world nymphs are second class citizens. They have a hard time getting jobs, homes, and even having families.

This treads on some more sensitive topics then I normally tackle, but I wanted to try it out some. It will cover things like abuse and abandonment, so beware.

Obligatory flavor text down here that I always do for some damn reason.

Series: Nymphs
creator: Pepperfighter
